implementation_principles: Keep ValueInvesting retirement as the active source-denominator baseline.
Fix false-green index status before relying on broad indexed lookup for later repair work.
Make read-only validation semantics reliable before running broad validators repeatedly.
Satisfy source promotion evidence for remaining Massive lanes without weakening fixture_before_live_required.
Keep private docs URLs out of persisted repo artifacts; use credentialed_vectorbtpro_api_docs_endpoint in durable files.
Preserve unrelated dirty work and stage exact paths only if a later commit is requested.

scope: retired external short-data provider from active source surfaces
synced VBT tool 002 active source count to 9
success_criteria: no active ValueInvesting references remain in active source/config/schema/script/test surfaces
VBT real-data, top300, and other300 smokes pass

target_surfaces: repo-index builder/query modules imported by scripts/v2_repo_index.py
changes: Compare git-tracked path set to repo-index sqlite files table.
Compare current tracked file hashes to indexed hashes for tracked files.
Compare current HEAD to index build metadata for repo and script-import indexes.
Return stale=true or failed status when tracked paths are missing, indexed tracked paths no longer exist, hashes differ, or HEAD metadata differs.
Emit precise stale reasons such as tracked_file_missing, indexed_file_missing, tracked_file_hash_changed, and index_head_mismatch.
Add or require explicit --write, --write-report, --write-receipt, or durable output flags before writing tracked reports, manifests, receipts, or checkpoints.
Default summary-only report generation to in-memory summaries or temporary paths.
Add regression coverage that summary-only validation leaves git-tracked outputs untouched.

target_surfaces: source fixture receipts and raw landing lineage reports referenced by scripts/v2_validate_sources.py
changes: Inspect the current source validator receipt contract before adding evidence.
Add bounded fixture receipts, schema coverage, and raw landing lineage evidence for each remaining Massive lane where existing fixture/materializer helpers can generate them.
Keep websocket live quotes as research/evidence unless a live route is explicitly activated.
Do not weaken fixture_before_live_required; either satisfy it or record an explicit non-promotion research-only classification.
Separate expected historical absolute routes from actionable private research route warnings.
Add freshness/build metadata to private research indexes.
Regenerate or explicitly mark missing VBT sweep metrics summary as an expected historical gap.
Prioritize explicit schema identity for production-run outputs, receipts, manifests, checkpoints, and research datasets.
Add persisted-artifact lint coverage for tokenized private docs URLs.
